_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in recognizing technical information that may be used for leads to enable remote operations (data includes users, passwords, email addresses, IP ranges of the target, frequency in DNI behavior, mail servers, domain servers, SMTP header information).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in writing technical documentation for data systems, including architecture diagrams, API specifications, operational runbooks, data dictionaries, and troubleshooting guides that enable team independence.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-004 (LS, cosine: 0.538), OP-S-002 (OP, cosine: 0.532).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.482). Shared vocabulary: [data, enable, skill, technical]. DCWF-only terms [addresses, behavior, dni, domain, email, frequency] vs WIDAI-only terms [api, architecture, diagrams, dictionaries, documentation, guides] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.854 (P=0.844, R=0.865). R exceeds P by 0.020 — the WIDAI KSA's 24 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 37 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.8%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in recognizing technical information that may be used for leads to enable" and "Skill in writing technical documentation for data systems, including architectur". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.551 > STS 0.482 (gap +0.069). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, enable, skill, technical] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.0%. Shared tokens: [data, enable, skill, technical]. DCWF-only: [addresses, behavior, dni, domain, email, frequency]. WIDAI-only: [api, architecture, diagrams, dictionaries, documentation, guides].
